name: Chicken Marsala#2 (Pswk86a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts, then using the flat (smooth) side of a meat mallet, pound the breasts to 1/4 inch thickness.
2. In a large frying pan, melt 2 tablespoons Butter over medium heat.
3. Add chicken and saute', turning once, until lightly browned about 2 minutes on each side. Remove and set aside.
4. Melt remaining butter in the pan.
5. Add shallots and mushrooms. Cook until mushrooms are lightly browned, 3-5 minutes.
6. Add Marsala and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
7. Add cream and lemon juice and return to a boil.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Return chicken to the pan and cook, turning in sauce, for about 3 minutes to reheat and finish cooking.
